text: Okay, voice note after the call with Marco Rivera about the DevForge sponsorship and co-maintainer arrangement. He's keen to move ahead but wants a one-page scope and a fixed price before he signs. Action items for me: draft the scope document covering the onboarding workshop and the two-week integration spike, send him the fixed-price quote — I'm thinking around forty thousand dollars — and book the kickoff for the week of June ninth. This is work, mark it urgent, he wants the scope by Wednesday.
